message:
feat(trace): add deterministic mesh trace replay engine and CLI

Implement TraceReplayEngine in fcp-mesh that replays captured traces
through MeshNode and compares expected vs actual decisions. Add
fcp trace replay CLI subcommand with JSON/CBOR input support and
machine-parseable output.

- TraceReplayReport with diffs and summary statistics
- ingest_trace_event_for_replay on MeshNode
- Integration tests for capture completeness, export roundtrip,
  multi-node staged replay with redaction validation
- CLI integration test for determinism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
